purpose: accepted SAM3.1 adapter prompt script for the clothes-rack Frame Set with explicit neutral not-found outcomes

rejected_alternative.reason: The generic phrase consistently moved the Anchor mask to the left image edge instead of the target rack.

accepted_combination.reason: The specific phrase produces clean masks on anchor, upper-00, ring-01, and ring-02 in this exact Frame Set. ring-11, ring-03, and upper-01 remain explicit neutral not-found views rather than being converted into negative evidence.

scope_note: This is an adapter-specific benchmark bootstrap prompt. The editor-facing point-only service contract remains separate from this fixture.
